page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion: Iron Maiden 4-Koma Gag Battle
text:
is a manga anthology series based on the Neon Genesis Evangelion: Iron Maiden video game. It is compiled into a single volume and was published by Kobunsha in September 1998 https://mediaarts-db.bunka.go.jp/id/C373200 

Editions

ISBN-10: ISBN 4334804306
ISBN-13: ISBN 9784334804305
